'''''Living Force Campaign Guide''''' is a paperback supplement to the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. It was written by [[Robert Wiese]] and [[Andy Collins]], published March [[2001]].

The Guide provides an overview of the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]], the setting of the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force]] roleplaying campaign. It details the history, the planets and locations, and the movers and shakers of the system, finishing up with short descriptions of some of the system's mysterious locations.
